name: Universal App Store
subtitle: One of the best app stores!

apps.name: SideStore
apps.subtitle: Refresh and sideload apps anywhere.
apps.localizedDescription: SideStore is an open-source iOS sideloading application that allows users to install, refresh, and manage IPA files directly on their device. Built as an alternative to AltStore, it enables app refreshing without requiring a computer on the same network by using a dedicated VPN-based pairing system. SideStore supports custom sources, app management, and convenient sideloading workflows, making it a powerful solution for installing apps outside the App Store.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: SideStore uses the local network to find and communicate with your device.

apps.name: Scarlet
apps.subtitle: Install, manage, and sideload IPA files.
apps.localizedDescription: Scarlet is an iOS sideloading platform that allows users to install, manage, and organize IPA files directly on their device. It supports app repositories, IPA importing, certificate-based signing, and app library management, providing a convenient all-in-one solution for discovering and installing applications without relying on a computer for everyday use.

privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: This app needs to access the local network to do wireless installs.

apps.name: Feather
apps.subtitle: Modern IPA signing and sideloading.
apps.localizedDescription: Feather is a modern iOS sideloading application that lets users sign, manage, and install IPA files directly on their device. Featuring a clean interface, certificate and provisioning profile management, repository support, and app library organization, Feather streamlines the sideloading experience while making it easy to discover, sign, and install applications from trusted sources.

apps.name: ESign
apps.subtitle: Sign and install IPA files on iOS.
apps.localizedDescription: ESign is an iOS app signing utility that allows users to import, sign, and install IPA files directly on their device using compatible certificates and provisioning profiles. It includes tools for certificate management, app signing, IPA importing, and installation, providing a convenient way to manage sideloaded applications without requiring a computer for everyday use.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: 授权后才能使用您的相机进行扫一扫
privacy.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: 开启定位服务，我们将根据您的位置,为您提供相关信息。在未经许可前不会开启定位服务，请放心使用。
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: 授权后才能将图片保存到本地相册
privacy.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: 授权后才能访问您的手机相册，您才能上传对应的图片
privacy.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: This identifier will be used to deliver personalized ads to you

apps.name: Ksign
apps.subtitle: On-device IPA signing and installation.
apps.localizedDescription: Ksign is a lightweight iOS application that allows users to sign and install IPA files directly on their device using personal certificates. It features certificate management, provisioning profile support, app library organization, and a clean interface designed for sideloading workflows. Ksign makes it easy to import, sign, and install apps without needing a computer after initial setup.
